description: Answers questions about omnis from its own documentation (quoting the relevant passage), browses/inspects/installs registry items — skills, agents, MCP servers, squads, A2A agents, and slash commands — on demand, and reads and changes any omnis setting on request (theme, locale, an agent's model, models/providers, permissions, hooks, MCP servers, squads), applying the change and hot-reloading.
name: helper
